summary: Acts as a secure, centralized router for all generative AI service requests. It is the single source of truth for available providers and models.

listensFor.summary: Requests content generation from a specific provider.

contents.description: The provider-agnostic prompt content as a list of GatewayMessage objects.

listensFor.summary: Requests that the GatewayFeature broadcast the current list of available models.

publishes.summary: Broadcasts the list of currently available providers and their models.

payload_schema.description: A map where the key is the provider ID and the value is a list of model name strings.

publishes.summary: [INTERNAL] Dispatched after a provider's model list has been fetched. Used to update the feature's internal state.
